notes: Measure 119 is Chapter 706 'LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY MEMBERS' (1985 sl CAA p03-06, Chapter 706 pp.2300-2303), NOT the Chapter 705 county-officer amendment shown in the pdftext_hint. The intent paragraph: 'This amendment creates eight new sections to article IV ... and repeals sections 1 through 13 and sections 16 through 18, and sections 22 through 24 of article IV.' SECTION 1 reads 'A new section to article IV of the Constitution of the State of North Dakota is hereby created and enacted to read as follows:' The senate-composition text appears as a new section with no struck/underlined markup. Because the prior art. IV section-1 numbering was repealed (SECTION 9 REPEAL) and these are freshly created/renumbered sections, there is no prior text for this section number. Approved June 12, 1984; effective December 1, 1986.

Chapter 706 'LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY MEMBERS' (1985 sl CAA p04). SECTION 2: 'A new section to article IV of the Constitution of the State of North Dakota is hereby created and enacted to read as follows:' Apportionment/redistricting text presented as a newly created section (no redline markup). Old art. IV sections 1-13 repealed by SECTION 9. No prior text for this section number.

Chapter 706 'LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY MEMBERS' (1985 sl CAA p05, Chapter 706 p.2302). SECTION 7: 'A new section to article IV of the Constitution of the State of North Dakota is hereby created and enacted to read as follows:' Terms-of-members / eighty-natural-days session text presented as a newly created section (no redline markup). Old art. IV sections 1-13, 16-18, 22-24 repealed by SECTION 9. No prior text for this section number.

Chapter 706 'LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY MEMBERS' (1985 sl CAA p05, Chapter 706 p.2302). SECTION 8: 'A new section to article IV of the Constitution of the State of North Dakota is hereby created and enacted to read as follows:' House-elects-presiding-officer text presented as a newly created section (no redline markup). No prior text for this section number.

Measure 157 is Chapter 495 'MORTGAGE TAXES PROHIBITED' (2015 sl caa p03), NOT the Chapter 494 art. III initiated-measure amendment in the pdftext_hint. Resolution 'to create and enact a new section to article X.' SECTION 1: 'A new section to article X of the Constitution of North Dakota is created and enacted as follows:' The entire mortgage-taxes text is rendered underlined (newly added) with no struck text. Brand-new section -- no prior text. Approved November 4, 2014.
